identity.name: Al-Ilm Academy
identity.tone: Warm, Welcoming, Premium, Spiritual but Modern
principles: Fusion: Islamic Heritage x Modern EdTech
Content: The Quran is the Hero
Zoom In: Focus on human connection (Teacher-Student)
Negative Space: Respect the sacred text with breathing room

dashboard.sidebar: hidden md:flex flex-col w-64 fixed inset-y-0 z-50 bg-white border-r border-primary/5

buttons.primary: h-12 px-8 rounded-full bg-primary text-white font-medium transition-all hover:scale-105 hover:shadow-lg active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: h-12 px-8 rounded-full bg-secondary/10 text-primary-900 font-medium transition-all hover:bg-secondary/20
buttons.outline: h-12 px-8 rounded-full border-2 border-primary/20 text-primary font-medium hover:border-primary hover:bg-primary/5

cards.feature: p-8 rounded-3xl bg-white border border-primary/5 shadow-soft hover:shadow-hover transition-all duration-300 group
cards.pricing: p-10 rounded-3xl bg-white border border-primary/10 relative overflow-hidden
cards.dashboard_widget: p-6 rounded-2xl bg-white border border-gray-100 shadow-sm

inputs.default: h-12 rounded-xl border-gray-200 focus:border-primary focus:ring-primary/20 bg-gray-50/50

pattern_detail.usage: Subtle background for cards or footers

general: Use 'Playfair Display' for all Headings (h1-h3) to give a premium, heritage feel.
Use 'Manrope' for all body text for maximum legibility.
Implement a 'Warm Cream' (#FDFBF7) background instead of pure white to reduce eye strain and feel more organic.
Use the 'Deep Emerald' (#044E42) as the primary brand color, but use it sparingly for high-impact elements.
Use 'Gold' (#D4AF37) ONLY for accents (borders, small icons, highlights). Do not use it for large backgrounds.
Ensure all interactive elements have a hover state that lifts them slightly (-translate-y-1).
For the 'Digital Mushaf', use a dark mode interface even if the rest of the app is light mode, to simulate a focused reading environment.
layout: Avoid standard Bootstrap grids. Use the 'Bento' grid style for the dashboard.
Add generous padding (py-24) to marketing sections.
Use 'glassmorphism' for the sticky navigation bar.
components: Customize Shadcn components to match the 'rounded-2xl' and 'rounded-3xl' radius.
Do not use default Shadcn slate colors. Override with the custom 'Emerald' and 'Sand' palette.

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use sonner for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
